'''washate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zonally|zonally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zonally|zonally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| washate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:washate|washate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:washatesher|washatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:washatesherĂ«m|washatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:washatero|washatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:washateshĂ«|washateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:washateshĂ«m|washateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwashatero|gokiwashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwashateshĂ«|gokiwashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwashateshĂ«m|gokiwashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowashankerom|gowashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowashankeshĂ«|gowashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowashankeshĂ«m|gowashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowashankeya|gowashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:washaterom|washaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:washatemu|washatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:washateya|washateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwashaterom|gokiwashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwashatemu|gokiwashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwashateya|gokiwashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:washashate|washashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:washashatesher|washashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:washashatesherĂ«m|washashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:washashatero|washashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:washashateshĂ«|washashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:washashateshĂ«m|washashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwashashatero|gokiwashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwashashateshĂ«|gokiwashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwashashateshĂ«m|gokiwashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowashashankerom|gowashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowashashankeshĂ«|gowashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowashashankeshĂ«m|gowashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowashashankeya|gowashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:washashaterom|washashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:washashatemu|washashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:washashateya|washashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwashashaterom|gokiwashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwashashatemu|gokiwashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwashashateya|gokiwashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠshĂŠte|wĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠshĂŠtesher|wĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠshĂŠtero|wĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠshĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠshĂŠterom|wĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠshĂŠtemu|wĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠshĂŠteya|wĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠshĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠshĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafshafte|wafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafshaftesher|wafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafshaftesherĂ«m|wafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafshaftero|wafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafshafteshĂ«|wafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafshafteshĂ«m|wafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafshaftero|gokiwafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafshafteshĂ«|gokiwafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafshafteshĂ«m|gokiwafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafshafnkerom|gowafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafshafnkeshĂ«|gowafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafshafnkeshĂ«m|gowafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafshafnkeya|gowafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafshafterom|wafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafshaftemu|wafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafshafteya|wafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafshafterom|gokiwafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafshaftemu|gokiwafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafshafteya|gokiwafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
